title: Your Vedic Report
pdf_error: The PDF could not be generated. Please try again — if it keeps failing, reload the page and retry.
narrative_hint: Generate your interpretation on the dashboard to add the written reading to this report. The chart, kundli, dasha, and yogas below are ready now.

pdf.subtitle: A sidereal birth-chart reading, computed on your device.
pdf.birth_details_intro: The exact moment and place of birth from which every placement in this report is derived.
pdf.technical_note: Computed with the Lahiri ayanamsa and the whole-sign house system. All values are emitted by the AlmaMesh engine on your device.
pdf.planets_intro: The sidereal longitude of each graha at the moment of birth — its sign, exact degree, nakshatra, house, and dignity. Combust planets are shown dimmed; (R) marks retrograde motion.
pdf.houses_intro: The twelve whole-sign houses counted from the Ascendant — each house's sign, its ruling planet, and the grahas placed within it.
pdf.charts_intro: The birth chart (D1 Rāśi) and the navāṁśa (D9), the divisional chart of marriage, dharma, and inner strength — both in the classical North-Indian diamond, houses fixed, signs rotating.
pdf.dasha_intro: The 120-year planetary period system keyed to the Moon’s nakshatra at birth. Each mahā-daśā colours a long chapter of life; the current period is marked in brass.
pdf.yogas_intro: The named planetary combinations the engine identifies in this chart, with their classical grade. A yoga is a tendency, never a verdict.
pdf.narrative_intro: A reading woven from the placements above — strengths, challenges, life themes, and guidance across the major life domains.
pdf.transits_intro: Where the grahas stand in today's sidereal sky against the natal chart — Sade Sati, slow-graha hits, the daśā × transit fusion, and the twelve-month timeline.
pdf.vargas_intro: The Shodaśavarga: sixteen harmonic divisions of the birth chart, each refining one arena of life — marriage (D9), career (D10), parents (D12), and beyond — closed by the Vargottama flags and the Viṁśopaka Bala tally.
pdf.strength_intro: Ashtakavarga bindus and the six-fold Ṣaḍbala — the classical strength arithmetic behind every judgement in this report.
pdf.domains_intro: Seven life domains read deterministically from houses, karakas, vargas, and current timing — the engine's synthesis, not AI narration.
pdf.rectification_intro: How the working birth time of this chart was established, and the dated life events that support it.

empty.heading: Report not ready
empty.no_chart: No chart found on this device yet. Generate your birth chart first, then come back to this report.
empty.no_interpretation: Your interpretation hasn't finished generating yet. Open the dashboard, generate your interpretation, then return here to print your report.

cover.cusp_note: ≈{{degrees}}° from the {{sign}} cusp. A few minutes' difference in the recorded birth time would make the rising sign {{sign}}, and every house placement in this report would shift with it. House-based interpretation depends on the recorded time; we recommend refining the birth time in AlmaMesh before relying on house placements.
cover.rectified_note: Birth time rectified by hand: entered {{entered}}, chart computed for {{rectified}} ({{sign}}{{minutes}} min).

houses.heading: Houses (Bhāva)
houses.whole_sign_note: Whole-sign houses: each house spans one full sign, counted from the Ascendant. House 1 carries the Ascendant.

vargas_full.heading: Divisional Charts (Shodaśavarga)
vargas_full.all_charts_note: All sixteen divisional charts, drawn as sign-placement plates — the engine emits no in-varga longitudes, so no degrees are shown.

strength.heading: Planetary Strength
strength.components_note: Component columns are in virūpas (60 virūpas = 1 rūpa); the total and requirement are in rūpas.

domains.heading: Life-Domain Forecasts
domains.windows_empty: No dated windows inside the next twelve months.

rectification.heading: Birth Time Authority

mode.cusp: Cusp resolution — two adjacent rising signs compared
mode.window: Time-window scan — candidate birth times across the stated window compared against dated life events

rectification.events_empty: No dated life events are attached to this rectification.
rectification.prior_note: The confirmed time sits closest to the recorded time — a gentle nudge in the fit; the dated events always carried more weight.
rectification.caveat: Event-based rectification resolves the rising sign, not the exact minute. Both times are kept on record; the working time above is the authority for every house placement in this report.

predictive_pending.title: Timing & strength sections
predictive_pending.body: Transits, divisional charts, planetary strength and the seven life-domain forecasts can be added to this report. Compute them first — about half a minute, entirely on this device.
predictive_pending.engine_warming: The chart engine is still starting up; computing becomes available once it is ready.
predictive_pending.error: The timing sections could not be computed.

footer.provenance: Calculated with the Lahiri Ayanamsa · AlmaMesh
